steps.title: Test the timing claim
steps.content: The team's claim says the mutation strongly affects dog size and existed before humans began deliberately breeding dogs, which the passage places within the last 12,000 years.

steps.title: Use older genetic evidence
steps.content: Finding the mutation in a dog ancestor 53,000 years ago directly supports the idea that it predates human breeding. B only compares wolves and Pomeranians, C does not address when the mutation arose, and D concerns overall dog size variation. The answer is A.
